creator: v.velox@vvelox.net
text:
shells/shell-include/pkg-desc does not currently have a WWW: line. Finally took the time to create one this morning.

How-To-Repeat: 

1: Notice shells/shell-include/pkg-desc does not have a WWW: line
2:
3: Something about monkies or monkeys.
4: Use the diff on the file.
5: Normally 'Enjoy.' would go right now, but given the level of change it is hard to decide if it does or not.
